name: Crispy Broiled Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Line a baking sheet with foil and coat it with vegetable oil spray.
3. Remove as much fat from the chicken as possible and pound it flat using the palm of your hand.
4. Mix together the bread crumbs, garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper in a pie pan.
5. In another container, lightly beat the egg white with a fork to break it up.
6. Dip each piece of chicken into the egg white, then roll it in the breadcrumb mixture. Repeat for all pieces.
7. Place on the prepared tray and broil about 5 inches from the heat source for 5 minutes.
8. Turn the pieces over and broil another 5 minutes.
Per serving: 272 calories, 5 grams fat.
